text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... On my latest test, I failed to put<n>down an
answer for some of the<n>questions again.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
When there's lots of questions, I seem to<n>run out
of time no matter what... If only I<n>could just
breeze through them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but I don't have to take remedial<n>lessons, so
no need to worry.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Since I thought so long and hard, all theanswers I did fill in were correct! ♪
